collectionName: Sprint 4 Task 4 — Brand Assets Logo Preview Update

collector.tool: Official-source and already captured candidate URL consolidation
collector.purpose: Update existing unapproved Batch 2 Brand Asset candidates with available logo preview references where direct official image references were already captured or safe official-domain preview fallbacks are useful for review.
collector.notes: Candidate-only update. These URLs are review references only and must not be hotlinked publicly. Do not approve automatically. Do not upload to Sanity assets automatically. Records remain unapproved candidates until manual review. Google Image results were used only as a discovery prompt; no Google cached image URL is used as a candidate logo source.

candidates.rightsTrademarkNotes: Official Leinster Rugby homepage image reference resolved to this Leinster Rugby logo SVG. Candidate reference only; verify rights and upload approved asset into Sanity before public use.

followUpRequired: Review all records manually in Brand Review.
Do not approve fallback favicon candidates as final logo assets.
Replace fallback previews with official full-size logo files where possible before approval.
Do not hotlink candidate logo URLs in public frontend templates.
Upload approved logo files into Sanity assets before any public use.
